description: Copy of a letter addressed to the Gaon R. Saadyah by a pupil of one of his disciples (only the concluding lengthy poem is preserved) and his reply. Saadiah's reply is prefaced with a heading in Judaeo-Arabic.  Published Schechter, Saadyana, pp. 57-58. AA
description_he: העתק מכתב לגאון ר' סעדיה מתלמיד תלמידו (נשמר רק השיר הארוך בסוף) ותשובתו; פורסם: שכטר, סעדיאנה
